title: New Migration Status and Formula Field Filters
story: As a data migration specialist, I want to filter fields by migration status and formula type, so that I can focus on specific subsets of fields during my review process.
description:
Add new filter options specific to the migration workflow:

1. **Migration Status filter**: Filter the field table by migration status (e.g., Not Reviewed, In Progress, Complete, No Migration).
2. **Show Formula Fields**: Available in both Dictionary and Migration views — filters to show only fields that have formulas.

These filters help users focus on specific field subsets during review, particularly useful for large objects with hundreds of fields.
acceptance_criteria: Migration Status filter is available on the migration screen
User can filter by individual status values
Show Formula Fields filter is available on both Dictionary and Migration screens
Formula filter shows only fields that have formula definitions
Filters can be combined with existing filters
ux_changes: New Migration Status dropdown filter and Show Formula Fields toggle added to the filter bar on both Migration and Dictionary screens.
middleware_changes: Query logic updated to support filtering by migration status and formula field presence.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the filters on staging and marked ready for review.
